subcodes.first_line: The fruit was from the tree, but now is witnessed through the Word; the light was from the sun, but now is manifest through the verse. Glory be to Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ثمر از شجر بوده حال از کلمه مشهود نور از شمس بوده حال از آیه مذکور سبحان
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration
